title: Progression+
description: This mod adds more progression to the game after and before netherite.
body:
This mod adds: Lithium,Sapphire,Steel,Steel Alloy,Ruby, Sculk and Brass armor. There are no tools in version 1.0.0. This mod was made in MCreator. There is alloying through crafting. This mod is survival friendly, as it has ways to get every item. Steel Alloy is 2 armor points better than netherite. Brass and Sapphire are 1 armor point better than netherite. Steel is equivlant to netherite. Lithium and Healers are 1 less than netherite.
Ruby is one more than netherite.
